title: Method of making integrated circuit medical devices
abstract: A method of making a universal implantable integrated circuit medical device platform having integral and monolithic circuit traces. The platform allows for implanting into a mammalian body single and multi-functional interface devices for sensing, monitoring stimulating and/or modulating physiological conditions within the body. Microelectronic circuitry may be integrated onto the platform or may be joined as modular components to the platform.
claims: 1. A method of making an integrated circuit stent, comprising the steps of: a. forming an electrically conductive stent framework having a thickness, a first end and a second end by depositing an electrically conductive material onto a cylindrical substrate, the electrically conductive material having at least one of a plastically deformable, shape memory, or superelastic properties; b. defining a plurality of circuit traces bounded by a plurality of slots in the electrically conductive stent framework; c. coating a dielectric layer onto the electrically conductive stent framework and plurality of circuit traces thereby filling the plurality of slots with dielectric and electrically isolating the plurality of circuit traces from the electrically conductive stent framework; d. exposing a portion of the plurality of circuit traces through the dielectric layer; and e. electrically coupling at least some of the plurality of circuit traces to an electrode configured to electrically interface with a portion of a mammalian body.
